home.meta_desc: The Future of Ops is Defined by AI. Simple, Hardcore, Automated.
home.subtitle: Minimalist, hardcore, and fully automated. deops is the decentralized operations infrastructure built for the next generation of AI-native engineers.
home.card1_desc: Predictive anomaly detection and automated root-cause analysis powered by LLMs, reducing MTTR to virtually zero.
home.card2_desc: Event-driven remediation and seamless CI/CD pipeline integrations. Define your infra state once, let algorithms handle the rest.
home.card3_desc: Obsidian-inspired Markdown engine for incident post-mortems and architecture specs. Your ops memory, eternally searchable.

services.subtitle: Centralized Head-Up Display (HUD) for infrastructure management, observability tools, and continuous delivery pipelines.

tools.qrgen_desc: Fast matrix encoding with real-time preview.

passgen.history_helper: History is stored locally in your browser and never uploaded to any server.

qrgen.helper: Scan the matrix on the right to retrieve information on mobile.
